atomic_facts.fact: The hand pinches the skin/muscle directly below the earlobe.
The hand moves downwards along the side of the neck in the second frame.

Korean text '귀 아래 튀어나온 근육을 잡아준다' (Grab the protruding muscle below the ear) is visible in the first frame.
Korean text '꾹꾹 누르면서 아래로 내려온다' (Press down firmly and move down) is visible in the second frame.
